Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 300 

PRE_ICL_DRUG_TYPE_TIER_04 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Drug Type for Tier 4 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies what types of drugs, if any, are covered on the 4th formulary tier during the 
pre-initial coverage limit (ICL) phase. 

The value contains a string of binary digits; each digit of the value indicates which types of drugs are 
covered on this tier of the formulary. 

A tier
